title: trifolium subterraneum subsp. longipes
intro: Trifolium subterraneum subsp. longipes, also known as long-stemmed subterranean clover, is a subspecies of the subterranean clover plant, a perennial legume native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including its ability to exhibit antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing stress, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Long-stemmed subterranean clover can be prepared as herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies and traditional medicine practices.
